---
title: "HADACA3 Framework - Figure Neurips"
subtitle: "Meta analysis"
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---



```{r, echo=FALSE, eval=TRUE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse=TRUE, comment = "#>", fig.width=12, fig.height=12, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, results="verbatim", dpi=75)
```

```{r re_loading_pckgs, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(yaml)
library(DT)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_light())
library(wesanderson)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(plotly)
library(fs)
library(GGally)
library(xtable)
library(ComplexHeatmap)

library(FactoMineR)

library(furrr)
# library(utils)


# if(exists("utils_script")){
#   source(utils_script)
# }else{
#   source("utils/data_processing.R")
# }
```

```{r load_table}

  weights_corrected = c(rep(1/4*1/2,2),
                      rep(1/4*1/4,4),
                      rep(1/4*1/4,4),
                      rep(1/4*1/2,2))

  metric_cols = c("pearson_row_norm","spearman_row_norm",
                  "pearson_tot_norm","pearson_col_norm","spearman_tot_norm","spearman_col_norm",
                  "rmse_norm","mae_norm","aitchison_norm","jsd_norm",
                  "sdid_norm","aid_norm")

weighgeomMean <- function(x) {
  prod(mapply(function(a,b) a^b, a=x, b=weights_corrected), na.rm=T)^(1/sum(weights_corrected))
}


if(!exists("results_li")){
  print("reading results li csv")
  
  all_functions_li = c(
    'preprocessing_mixRNA', 'feature_selection_mixRNA',
    'preprocessing_RNA', 'feature_selection_RNA',
    'preprocessing_scRNA', 'feature_selection_scRNA', 'deconvolution_rna',
    'preprocessing_mixMET', 'feature_selection_mixMET',
    'preprocessing_MET', 'feature_selection_MET', 'deconvolution_met',
    'late_integration'
  )
  results_li_all_dataset = rbind(
    read.csv(file = gzfile("results_li_invitro_invivo_insilicopsuedobulk.csv.gz")),
    read.csv(file = gzfile("results_li_EMFA_Copule_Immuneprop1.csv.gz")),
    read.csv(file = gzfile("results_li_NODEP6_NODEP4_NODEP1.csv.gz"))
  ) 
  # results_li_all_dataset = read.csv(file = gzfile("../old_results_li_ei/results_li.csv.gz"))
  results_li_all_dataset = results_li_all_dataset[-(results_li_all_dataset$dataset == "51847637672785"),]
  results_li_all_dataset = results_li_all_dataset[!is.na(results_li_all_dataset$dataset),]
  results_li_all_dataset = results_li_all_dataset[!is.na(results_li_all_dataset$feature_selection_mixRNA),]
  
  
  results_li_all_dataset[all_functions_li] = lapply(results_li_all_dataset[all_functions_li], as.factor)
  
  results_li = results_li_all_dataset %>% 
    filter(feature_selection_mixMET != "Toastnbfs") %>% 
    group_by(
      preprocessing_mixRNA, feature_selection_mixRNA,
      preprocessing_RNA, feature_selection_RNA,
      preprocessing_scRNA, feature_selection_scRNA, deconvolution_rna,
      preprocessing_mixMET, feature_selection_mixMET,
      preprocessing_MET, feature_selection_MET, deconvolution_met,
      late_integration
    ) %>% 
    summarise(
      across(where(is.numeric), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop"
    ) %>% 
    as.data.frame()

  
  results_li = results_li[!is.na(results_li$feature_selection_RNA),] # One NA
  
  results_li$score_aggreg= apply(   #_corrected 
    results_li[, metric_cols],
    1,weighgeomMean
  )

}

if(!exists("results_ei")){
  print("reading reulsts ei csv")
  
  all_functions_ei <- c(
    'preprocessing_mixRNA', 'feature_selection_mixRNA',
    'preprocessing_RNA', 'feature_selection_RNA',
    'preprocessing_scRNA', 'feature_selection_scRNA',
    'preprocessing_mixMET', 'feature_selection_mixMET',
    'preprocessing_MET', 'feature_selection_MET',
    'early_integration', 'deconvolution'
  )
  
  results_ei_all_dataset = rbind(
    read.csv(file = gzfile("results_ei_invitro_invivo_insilicopsuedobulk.csv.gz")),
    read.csv(file = gzfile("results_ei_EMFA_Copule_Immuneprop1.csv.gz")),
    read.csv(file = gzfile("results_ei_NODEP6_NODEP4_NODEP1.csv.gz"))
  )  
  # results_ei_all_dataset = read.csv(file = gzfile("../old_results_li_ei/merged_results_ei.csv.gz"))
  
  tmp = results_ei_all_dataset[results_ei_all_dataset$score_aggreg == 0,]
  apply(tmp[,c("dataset", "ref", all_functions_ei)], 2, \(col_i){unique(col_i)})
  # On a toutes les combinaisons possibles et tout les datasets, donc ce n'est pas liée à un truc en particulier 
  # J'ai regardée le fichier 06, et on ne véréfie pas la somme à 1 mais on force bien à ce que tout les min soit à 1e-9
  
  
  results_ei_all_dataset[all_functions_ei] <- lapply(results_ei_all_dataset[all_functions_ei], as.factor)

  results_ei = results_ei_all_dataset %>% 
    filter(feature_selection_mixMET != "Toastnbfs") %>% 
    group_by(
      preprocessing_mixRNA, feature_selection_mixRNA,
      preprocessing_RNA, feature_selection_RNA,
      preprocessing_scRNA, feature_selection_scRNA,
      preprocessing_mixMET, feature_selection_mixMET,
      preprocessing_MET, feature_selection_MET,
      deconvolution, early_integration
    ) %>% 
    summarise(
      across(where(is.numeric), \(x) mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop"
    ) %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  
  
  results_ei = results_ei[results_ei$score_aggreg != 0,]





  # recompute corrected aggregated score
  results_ei$score_aggreg= apply(   #_corrected 
    results_ei[, metric_cols],
    1,weighgeomMean
  )

}
```


```{r ei_levels_def}
levels(factor(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA))
levels(factor(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA))

levels(factor(results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA))
levels(factor(results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA))

levels(factor(results_ei$preprocessing_MET))
levels(factor(results_ei$feature_selection_MET))

levels(factor(results_ei$early_integration))

levels(factor(results_ei$deconvolution))


results_ei$preprocessing_RNA = factor(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA, levels = c("ppID", "LogNorm", "Scale"))
results_ei$feature_selection_RNA = factor(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA, levels = c("fsID", "SCcluster", "scpseudobulk", "Toastbulknbfs", "Toastvst"))
results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA = factor(results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA, levels = c("ppID", "sccluster", "scConcat", "LogNorm", "Scale", "scbinarypseudobulklog"))
results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA = factor(results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA, levels = c("fsID", "SCcluster", "scpseudobulk", "Toastbulknbfs", "Toastvst"))
results_ei$preprocessing_MET = factor(results_ei$preprocessing_MET, levels = c("ppID", "LogNorm", "Scale"))
results_ei$feature_selection_MET = factor(results_ei$feature_selection_MET, levels = c("fsID", "maxdiscriminant", "mostmethylated", "SPLSDA", "Toastpercent")) # , "Toastnbfs"
results_ei$early_integration = factor(results_ei$early_integration, levels = c("concatnoscale", "concatscale", "Kernel", "omicade4bulk", "OT"))
results_ei$deconvolution = factor(results_ei$deconvolution, levels = c("nnls", "lm", "nnlslargeref", "RLR", "RLRnnls", "RLRpoisson", "epic"))
```

```{r li_levels_def}
levels(factor(results_li$preprocessing_RNA))
levels(factor(results_li$feature_selection_RNA))

levels(factor(results_li$preprocessing_scRNA))
levels(factor(results_li$feature_selection_scRNA))

levels(factor(results_li$preprocessing_MET))
levels(factor(results_li$feature_selection_MET))

levels(factor(results_li$deconvolution_rna))
levels(factor(results_li$deconvolution_met))

levels(factor(results_li$late_integration))


results_li$preprocessing_RNA = factor(results_li$preprocessing_RNA, levels = c("ppID", "LogNorm", "Scale", "nopp")) # , "CPM"
results_li$feature_selection_RNA = factor(results_li$feature_selection_RNA, levels = c("fsID", "SCcluster",  "scpseudobulk", "Toastbulknbfs", "Toastvst", "nofs")) # , "scSPLSDA"
results_li$preprocessing_scRNA = factor(results_li$preprocessing_scRNA, levels = c("ppID", "LogNorm", "Scale", "scbinarypseudobulklog", "sccluster", "scConcat", "nopp")) # , "CPM", "scCCAintegration", "scScale"
results_li$feature_selection_scRNA = factor(results_li$feature_selection_scRNA, levels = c("fsID", "SCcluster",  "scpseudobulk", "Toastbulknbfs", "Toastvst", "nofs")) # , "scSPLSDA"
results_li$preprocessing_MET = factor(results_li$preprocessing_MET, levels = c("ppID", "LogNorm", "Scale", "nopp")) # , "normalize"
results_li$feature_selection_MET = factor(results_li$feature_selection_MET, levels = c("fsID", "maxdiscriminant", "mostmethylated", "SPLSDA", "Toastpercent", "nofs")) # , "Toastnbfs"
results_li$deconvolution_rna = factor(results_li$deconvolution_rna, levels = c("nnls", "lm",  "nnlslargeref", "RLR", "RLRnnls", "RLRpoisson", "epic", "node"))
results_li$deconvolution_met = factor(results_li$deconvolution_met, levels = c("nnls", "lm",  "nnlslargeref", "RLR", "RLRnnls", "RLRpoisson", "epic", "node"))
results_li$late_integration = factor(results_li$late_integration, levels = c("limean", "TunedJ", "limeanRMSE", "OnlyMet", "OnlyRna")) # , "liCtSens"
```


```{r color_choices}

# wes_palette("Royal2") # for modules
module_pal = wes_palette("Royal2")[c(2, 3, 5, 4, 1)]
names(module_pal) = c("preprocessing", "feature_selection", "deconvolution", "early_integration", "late_integration")




# generated with Claude

all_levels <- unique(c(
  levels(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA),
  levels(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA),
  levels(results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA),
  levels(results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA),
  levels(results_ei$preprocessing_MET),
  levels(results_ei$feature_selection_MET),
  levels(results_ei$early_integration),
  levels(results_ei$deconvolution),
  levels(results_li$preprocessing_RNA),
  levels(results_li$feature_selection_RNA),
  levels(results_li$preprocessing_scRNA),
  levels(results_li$feature_selection_scRNA),
  levels(results_li$preprocessing_MET),
  levels(results_li$feature_selection_MET),
  levels(results_li$deconvolution_rna),
  levels(results_li$deconvolution_met),
  levels(results_li$late_integration)
))

id_levels    <- all_levels[grepl(c("ID"), all_levels) | grepl(c("nopp"), all_levels) | grepl(c("nofs"), all_levels) | grepl(c("node"), all_levels) | grepl(c("OnlyRna"), all_levels) | grepl(c("OnlyMet"), all_levels)]
other_levels <- all_levels[!(grepl(c("ID"), all_levels) | grepl(c("nopp"), all_levels) | grepl(c("nofs"), all_levels) | grepl(c("node"), all_levels))]
n_other <- length(other_levels)

palette_colors <- colorRampPalette(
  c(brewer.pal(7, "Set2"),
    brewer.pal(7, "Dark2"),
    brewer.pal(8, "Set3"))
)(n_other)


level_colors <- c(
  setNames(rep("grey60", length(id_levels)), id_levels),
  setNames(palette_colors, other_levels)
)

# # Verification
# scales::show_col(level_colors, ncol = 6)
# print(level_colors)
```






# Top methods


## Overall EI top 10 method by median of the aggregated score

```{r results_ei_top10}
results_ei_top10 = results_ei %>%
  group_by(preprocessing_mixRNA, feature_selection_mixRNA, 
           preprocessing_RNA, feature_selection_RNA, 
           # preprocessing_scRNA, feature_selection_scRNA, 
           preprocessing_mixMET,feature_selection_mixMET, 
           preprocessing_MET, feature_selection_MET,  
           early_integration, deconvolution, .groups = "keep") %>% 
  summarise(GlobalScore = median(score_aggreg)) %>%
  arrange(desc(GlobalScore))


datatable(results_ei_top10[1:10,])
xtable(results_ei_top10[1:10,-c(1,2,7,8,11)], digits = 5)
```

## Overall LI top 10 method by median of the aggregated score

```{r results_li_top10}
results_li_top10 = results_li %>%
  group_by(preprocessing_mixRNA, feature_selection_mixRNA, 
           preprocessing_RNA, feature_selection_RNA, 
           preprocessing_scRNA, feature_selection_scRNA, deconvolution_rna, 
           preprocessing_mixMET,feature_selection_mixMET, 
           preprocessing_MET, feature_selection_MET, deconvolution_met, 
           late_integration, .groups = "keep") %>% 
  summarise(GlobalScore = median(score_aggreg)) %>%
  arrange(desc(GlobalScore))

# LiCtSens == limean
# No methods use single-cell so repetition occurs
results_li_top10 = results_li_top10[results_li_top10$late_integration != "liCtSens",]
datatable(results_li_top10[c(1,10,19,26:50),-c(14)])
xtable(results_li_top10[c(1,10,19,28,37,55,64,73,82, 91),-c(1,2,8,9,14)], digits = 6)

# before group_by and mean by dataset
# datatable(results_li_top10[c(1,3,4,7,9,11,16,21,26,29),-c(14)])
# xtable(results_li_top10[c(1,3,4,7,9,11,16,21,26,29),-c(1,2,8,9,14)], digits = 6)
```


## By variables

### violin plot

```{r fun_arranged_boxplot}
arranged_violinplot = function(data, x_var, inte, score = "score_aggreg", module_palette = module_pal, level_palette = level_colors){
  
  if (x_var != "early_integration" && x_var != "early_integration") {
    data = data[data$preprocessing_mixRNA != "nopp",]
    data = data[data$feature_selection_mixRNA != "nofs",]
    data = data[data$preprocessing_RNA != "nopp",]
    data = data[data$feature_selection_RNA != "nofs",]
    data = data[data$preprocessing_scRNA != "nopp",]
    data = data[data$feature_selection_scRNA != "nofs",]
    data = data[data$preprocessing_mixMET != "nopp",]
    data = data[data$feature_selection_mixMET != "nofs",]
    data = data[data$preprocessing_MET != "nopp",]
    data = data[data$feature_selection_MET != "nofs",]
  }
  
  search_module = which(sapply(names(module_palette), \(module_i){grepl(module_i, x = x_var)}) == 1) 
  color_module = module_pal[search_module]
  
  
  order_level_x_var = sapply(levels(data[,x_var]), \(level_i){
    median(data[data[,x_var] == level_i, score], na.rm = TRUE)
  })
  # if we look at mae, we want to look at the minimum, otherwise (score aggreg and cor) the max
  order_level_x_var = order_level_x_var[order(order_level_x_var, decreasing = !(score == "mae"))]
  data[,x_var] = factor(data[,x_var], levels = names(order_level_x_var))
  
  
  print(car::leveneTest(y = data[,score], data[,x_var]))
  
  
  aes_base = aes_string(x = x_var, y = score, fill = x_var)
  aes_base_median = aes_string(
    x = x_var, 
    y = sapply(levels(data[,x_var]), \(level_i){
      median(data[data[,x_var] == level_i, score])
    })
  )
  ggplot(data[,c(x_var, score)]) +
    # geom_boxplot(aes_base) +
    geom_violin(aes_base, draw_quantiles = 0.5) +
    # median point manually displayed
    stat_summary(aes_base, fun = median, geom = "point", shape = "-", size = 5, color = "red") + 
    ylim(0, 1) +
    labs(
      title = paste("Aggregated score for", x_var), #, "within early integration strategies"
      subtitle = paste("within", inte, "integration strategies"), # "ordered by median of aggregated score (red horizontal line)",
      x = element_blank(),
      y = "Aggregated score",
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = level_palette[levels(data[,x_var])]
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8),
      panel.border = element_rect(color = color_module, fill = NA, linewidth = 3),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
      legend.position = "none" # "bottom"
    )
  
}


arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[1], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[2], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[3], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[4], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[5], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[6], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[7], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[8], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[9], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[10], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[11], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[12], inte = "late")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_li, x_var = all_functions_li[13], inte = "late")

arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[1], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[2], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[3], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[4], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[5], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[6], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[7], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[8], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[9], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[10], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[11], inte = "early")
arranged_violinplot(data = results_ei, x_var = all_functions_ei[12], inte = "early")
```


### Modules matrices

#### Late_integration

```{r modules_matrices}

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-0.075, -0.025, 0, 0.025, 0.075),
  # wes_palette("Zissou1")[1:5]
  # c("blue", "white", "red")
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "RdBu")[5:1]
)


## Overall LI median score
overall_median_li_score_aggreg = median(results_li$score_aggreg, na.rm = TRUE) # = 0.6824578



### Preprocessing
results_li %>% 
  group_by(preprocessing_RNA, preprocessing_MET) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% print(n = 25)

med_score_aggr_PP = matrix(
  data = c(
    results_li %>% 
      group_by(preprocessing_RNA, preprocessing_MET) %>% 
      summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
      pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
    NA # Since there is no nopp/nopp combination 
  ),
  byrow = TRUE, # Methylation is in columns
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_RNA)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_MET)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$preprocessing_RNA),
    levels(results_li$preprocessing_MET)
  )
)


Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP[-nrow(med_score_aggr_PP), -ncol(med_score_aggr_PP)],
  name = "median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Preprocessing RNA",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  # row_split = c(1,1,1,1,2),
  # column_split = c(1,1,1,1,2),
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  # border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


### Feature selection
results_li %>% 
  group_by(feature_selection_RNA, feature_selection_MET) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% print(n = 25)

med_score_aggr_FS = matrix(
  data = c(
    results_li %>% 
      group_by(feature_selection_RNA, feature_selection_MET) %>% 
      summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
      pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
    NA # Since there is no nopp/nopp combination 
  ),
  byrow = TRUE, # Methylation is in columns
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_RNA)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_MET)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$feature_selection_RNA),
    levels(results_li$feature_selection_MET)
  )
)


Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS[-nrow(med_score_aggr_FS), -ncol(med_score_aggr_FS)],
  name = "fsID",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selecion MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Feature selecion RNA",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  # row_split = c(1,1,1,2),
  # column_split = c(1,2),
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  # border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


### Deconvolution
results_li %>% 
  group_by(deconvolution_rna, deconvolution_met) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% print(n = 25)

med_score_aggr_deconv = matrix(
  data = c(
    results_li %>% 
      group_by(deconvolution_rna, deconvolution_met) %>% 
      summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
      pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
    NA # Since there is no nopp/nopp combination 
  ),
  byrow = TRUE, # Methylation is in columns
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$deconvolution_rna)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$deconvolution_met)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$deconvolution_rna),
    levels(results_li$deconvolution_met)
  )
)


Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_deconv[-nrow(med_score_aggr_deconv), -ncol(med_score_aggr_deconv)],
  name = "median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Deconvolution MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Deconvolution RNA",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  # row_split = c(1,1,1,1,1,1,1,2),
  # column_split = c(1,1,1,1,1,1,1,2),
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  # border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)














# style anova
rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET = c(-4,-5)

med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, preprocessing_RNA) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_RNA))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$preprocessing_RNA)[-length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_RNA))]
  )
)


med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, preprocessing_scRNA) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_scRNA))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$preprocessing_scRNA)[-length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_scRNA))]
  )
)


med_score_aggr_PP_MET_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, preprocessing_MET) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_MET))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$preprocessing_MET)[-length(levels(results_li$preprocessing_MET))]
  )
)





med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, feature_selection_RNA) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_RNA))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$feature_selection_RNA)[-length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_RNA))]
  )
)


med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, feature_selection_scRNA) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_scRNA))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$feature_selection_scRNA)[-length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_scRNA))]
  )
)


med_score_aggr_FS_MET_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, feature_selection_MET) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_MET))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$feature_selection_MET)[-length(levels(results_li$feature_selection_MET))]
  )
)





med_score_aggr_deconv_RNA_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, deconvolution_rna) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$deconvolution_rna))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$deconvolution_rna)[-length(levels(results_li$deconvolution_rna))]
  )
)


med_score_aggr_deconv_MET_LI = matrix(
  data = results_li %>% 
    group_by(late_integration, deconvolution_met) %>% 
    filter(late_integration != "OnlyRna", late_integration != "OnlyMet") %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_li_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET]),
  ncol = length(levels(results_li$deconvolution_met))-1,
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_li$late_integration)[rmv_only_RNA_onlyMET],
    levels(results_li$deconvolution_met)[-length(levels(results_li$deconvolution_met))]
  )
)






col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(min(c(med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_LI, med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_LI, med_score_aggr_PP_MET_LI, med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_LI, med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_LI, med_score_aggr_FS_MET_LI, med_score_aggr_deconv_RNA_LI, med_score_aggr_deconv_MET_LI), na.rm = TRUE),
    0, 
    max(c(med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_LI, med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_LI, med_score_aggr_PP_MET_LI, med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_LI, med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_LI, med_score_aggr_FS_MET_LI, med_score_aggr_deconv_RNA_LI, med_score_aggr_deconv_MET_LI), na.rm = TRUE)),
  c("#2166ac", "#f7f7f7", "#b2182b")
)





ht_PP_rna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "PP RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_scrna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "PP scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_met = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP_MET_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "PP MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_rna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "FS RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_scrna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "FS scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_met = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS_MET_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "FS MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_deconv_rna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_deconv_RNA_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Deconv RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_deconv_met = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_deconv_MET_LI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Deconv MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


ht_list = ht_PP_rna + ht_PP_met + ht_FS_rna + ht_FS_met + ht_deconv_rna + ht_deconv_met # + ht_PP_scrna + ht_FS_scrna 

draw(ht_list, 
     column_title = "Blocks interactions with late integration",
     column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
     annotation_legend_side = "right")
```

#### Early_integration

```{r modules_matrices}

col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(-0.075, -0.025, 0, 0.025, 0.075),
  # wes_palette("Zissou1")[1:5]
  # c("blue", "white", "red")
  RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(5, "RdBu")[5:1]
)


## Overall EI median score
overall_median_ei_score_aggreg = median(results_ei$score_aggreg) # = 0.5460786


### Preprocessing
results_ei %>% 
  group_by(preprocessing_RNA, preprocessing_MET) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% print(n = 25)

med_score_aggr_PP = matrix(
  data = c(
    results_ei %>% 
      group_by(preprocessing_RNA, preprocessing_MET) %>% 
      summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
      pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
    NA # Since there is no nopp/nopp combination 
  ),
  byrow = TRUE, # Methylation is in columns
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$preprocessing_MET)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA),
    levels(results_ei$preprocessing_MET)
  )
)


Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP,
  name = "median aggr score",
  # title = "Omcis preprocessing comparison on median aggregated score for early inte",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Preprocessing RNA",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  # border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


### Feature selection
results_ei %>% 
  group_by(feature_selection_RNA, feature_selection_MET) %>% 
  summarise(n = n(), median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% print(n = 25)

med_score_aggr_FS = matrix(
  data = c(
    results_ei %>% 
      group_by(feature_selection_RNA, feature_selection_MET) %>% 
      summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
      pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
    NA # Since there is no nopp/nopp combination 
  ),
  byrow = TRUE, # Methylation is in columns
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$feature_selection_MET)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA),
    levels(results_ei$feature_selection_MET)
  )
)


Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS,
  name = "median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selecion MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Feature selecion RNA",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  # row_split = c(1,1,1,2),
  # column_split = c(1,2),
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  # border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)










# style anova

med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, preprocessing_RNA) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$preprocessing_RNA)
  )
)


med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, preprocessing_scRNA) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA)
  )
)


med_score_aggr_PP_MET_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, preprocessing_MET) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$preprocessing_MET)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$preprocessing_MET)
  )
)





med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, feature_selection_RNA) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$feature_selection_RNA)
  )
)


med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, feature_selection_scRNA) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA)
  )
)


med_score_aggr_FS_MET_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, feature_selection_MET) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$feature_selection_MET)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$feature_selection_MET)
  )
)





med_score_aggr_deconv_EI = matrix(
  data = results_ei %>% 
    group_by(early_integration, deconvolution) %>% 
    summarise(median = median(score_aggreg)) %>% 
    pull(median) - overall_median_ei_score_aggreg,
  byrow = TRUE, 
  nrow = length(levels(results_ei$early_integration)),
  ncol = length(levels(results_ei$deconvolution)),
  dimnames = list(
    levels(results_ei$early_integration),
    levels(results_ei$deconvolution)
  )
)






col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(min(c(med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_EI, med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_EI, med_score_aggr_PP_MET_EI, med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_EI, med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_EI, med_score_aggr_FS_MET_EI, med_score_aggr_deconv_EI), na.rm = TRUE),
    0, 
    max(c(med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_EI, med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_EI, med_score_aggr_PP_MET_EI, med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_EI, med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_EI, med_score_aggr_FS_MET_EI, med_score_aggr_deconv_EI), na.rm = TRUE)),
  c("#2166ac", "#f7f7f7", "#b2182b")
)





ht_PP_rna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP_RNA_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "PP RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_scrna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP_SCRNA_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "PP scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la dupeication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_met = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_PP_MET_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "PP MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la dupeication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_rna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS_RNA_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "FS RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la dupeication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_scrna = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS_SCRNA_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "FS scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la dupeication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_met = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_FS_MET_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "FS MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la dupeication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_deconv = Heatmap(
  med_score_aggr_deconv_EI,
  name = "Diff median aggr score",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Deconv",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  # cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la dupeication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


ht_list = ht_PP_rna + ht_PP_met + ht_FS_rna + ht_FS_met + ht_deconv #  + ht_PP_scrna + ht_FS_scrna

draw(ht_list, 
     column_title = "Blocks interactions with early integration",
     column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
     annotation_legend_side = "right")
```


### Anova

#### Late_integration

```{r anova_k_factor_and_interaction}
# First factor will be the baseline


all_functions_li_without_mix = all_functions_li[c(3:7,10:13)] # to avoid repetition
stats::anova(lm(score_aggreg ~ ., data = results_li[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)]))
mod = lm(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + deconvolution_rna + preprocessing_MET + feature_selection_MET + deconvolution_met + late_integration)^2, data = results_li[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)])
stats::anova(mod)
summary(mod)


### doesn't work: too much row
# marg = emmeans::emmeans(mod, ~ preprocessing_RNA:deconvolution_rna)
# pairs(marg, adjust = "tukey")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$preprocessing_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$preprocessing_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$feature_selection_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$feature_selection_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")



interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$preprocessing_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$preprocessing_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$feature_selection_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$feature_selection_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")


interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$preprocessing_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_met, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$preprocessing_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$feature_selection_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_met, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$feature_selection_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")



interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$deconvolution_rna, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$deconvolution_met, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$late_integration, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_li$deconvolution_rna, 
                 trace.factor = results_li$deconvolution_met, 
                 response = results_li$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

### TukeyHSD: not very usefull because it's at the factor level for each feature
# TukeyHSD(aov(score_aggreg ~ ., data = results_li[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)]))
# plot(TukeyHSD(aov(score_aggreg ~ ., data = results_li[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)])))
# 
# Tukey_mod = TukeyHSD(aov(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + deconvolution_rna + preprocessing_MET + deconvolution_met + late_integration)^2, data = results_li[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)]))
# plot(Tukey_mod)
```

#### Early_integration

```{r anova_k_factor_and_interaction}
# First factor will be the baseline


all_functions_ei_without_mix = all_functions_ei[c(3:6,9:12)] # to avoid repetition
stats::anova(lm(score_aggreg ~ ., data = results_ei[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_ei_without_mix)]))
mod = lm(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + preprocessing_MET + feature_selection_MET + early_integration + deconvolution)^2, data = results_ei[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_ei_without_mix)])
stats::anova(mod)
summary(mod)


### doesn't work: too much row
# marg = emmeans::emmeans(mod, ~ preprocessing_RNA:deconvolution_rna)
# pairs(marg, adjust = "tukey")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$preprocessing_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$preprocessing_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$feature_selection_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$feature_selection_RNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")



interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$preprocessing_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_rna, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$feature_selection_scRNA, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")


interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$preprocessing_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_met, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$preprocessing_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$feature_selection_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_met, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$feature_selection_MET, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")



interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_rna, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")
interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_met, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$early_integration, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

interaction.plot(x.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_rna, 
                 trace.factor = results_ei$deconvolution_met, 
                 response = results_ei$score_aggreg,
                 type = "b")

### TukeyHSD: not very usefull because it's at the factor level for each feature
# TukeyHSD(aov(score_aggreg ~ ., data = results_ei[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_ei_without_mix)]))
# plot(TukeyHSD(aov(score_aggreg ~ ., data = results_ei[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_ei_without_mix)])))
# 
# Tukey_mod = TukeyHSD(aov(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + deconvolution_rna + preprocessing_MET + deconvolution_met + early_integration)^2, data = results_ei[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_ei_without_mix)]))
# plot(Tukey_mod)
```


### Complex Heatmap anova

#### Late_integration

```{r integration_interaction_plot}
library(tibble)

all_functions_li_without_mix = all_functions_li[c(3:7,10:13)] # to avoid repetition
mod = lm(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + deconvolution_rna + preprocessing_MET + feature_selection_MET + deconvolution_met + late_integration)^2, data = results_li[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)])

mod$coefficients[!is.na(mod$coefficients)]



## Model

# First model for integration strategie
anova_results = stats::anova(mod) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("interaction")

# then two model only for each uni-omic strategie
mod_only_RNA = lm(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + deconvolution_rna)^2, data = results_li[results_li$late_integration == "OnlyRna",c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)])
# anova_results_only_RNA = stats::anova(mod_only_RNA) %>%
#   as.data.frame() %>%
#   rownames_to_column("interaction")

mod_only_MET = lm(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_MET + deconvolution_met)^2, data = results_li[results_li$late_integration == "OnlyMet",c("score_aggreg", all_functions_li_without_mix)]) # feature_selection_MET have only fsID
# anova_results_only_MET = stats::anova(mod_only_MET) %>%
#   as.data.frame() %>%
#   rownames_to_column("interaction")




## Heatmap

vars_x = c("deconvolution_rna", "deconvolution_met", "preprocessing_RNA", "feature_selection_RNA", "preprocessing_MET", "preprocessing_scRNA", "feature_selection_scRNA")
vars_y = "late_integration"



mod_summary = summary(mod)
coef_df = as.data.frame(mod_summary$coefficients) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term")

coef_filtered = coef_df %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, "late_integration") & str_detect(term, paste(vars_x, collapse = "|"))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    pvalue   = `Pr(>|t|)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    omic_type = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_rna") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
    ),
    PP_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_scRNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_MET)[^:]+")
    ),
    FS_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_scRNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_MET)[^:]+")
    ),
    # Extraire la modalité de deconvolution (après "deconvolution_rna" ou "deconvolution_met")
    deconv_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_rna") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution_rna)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution_met)[^:]+")
    ),
    # Extraire la modalité de late_integration (après "late_integration")
    late_int_method = str_extract(term, "(?<=late_integration).+$") %>%
      str_remove("^:") %>%  # enlever le ":" au début si présent
      str_remove(":deconvolution_(rna|met).*$")  # enlever la partie deconvolution à la fin
  )
  # mutate(
  #   deconv_label = paste0(deconv_method, "\n(", omic_type, ")"),
  #   pvalue_signif = pvalue < 0.05
  # )





mod_summary_only_RNA = summary(mod_only_RNA)
coef_df_only_RNA = as.data.frame(mod_summary_only_RNA$coefficients) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term")
# add late_integrationOnlyRna: to base levels
coef_df_only_RNA[2:20,"term"] = paste0("late_integrationOnlyRna:", coef_df_only_RNA[2:20,"term"])

coef_filtered_only_RNA = coef_df_only_RNA %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, "late_integration") & str_detect(term, paste(vars_x, collapse = "|"))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    pvalue   = `Pr(>|t|)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    omic_type = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_rna") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
    ),
    PP_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_scRNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_MET)[^:]+")
    ),
    FS_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_scRNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_MET)[^:]+")
    ),
    # Extraire la modalité de deconvolution (après "deconvolution_rna" ou "deconvolution_met")
    deconv_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_rna") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution_rna)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution_met)[^:]+")
    ),
    late_int_method = "UniOmic (noLI)"
  )



mod_summary_only_MET = summary(mod_only_MET)
coef_df_only_MET = as.data.frame(mod_summary_only_MET$coefficients) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term")
# add late_integrationOnlyRna: to base levels
coef_df_only_MET[2:10,"term"] = paste0("late_integrationOnlyRna:", coef_df_only_MET[2:10,"term"])

coef_filtered_only_MET = coef_df_only_MET %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, "late_integration") & str_detect(term, paste(vars_x, collapse = "|"))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    pvalue   = `Pr(>|t|)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    omic_type = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
    ),
    PP_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_scRNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_MET)[^:]+")
    ),
    FS_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_scRNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_MET)[^:]+")
    ),
    # Extraire la modalité de deconvolution (après "deconvolution_met" ou "deconvolution_met")
    deconv_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution_met)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution_met") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution_met)[^:]+")
    ),
    late_int_method = "UniOmic (noLI)"
  )





#  Since uni-omic strategies cannot be compared with integration strategies (because
# they doesn't use the same baseline in the actual manner) it doesn't make sense to 
# aggregate tables

# coef_filtered = bind_rows(coef_filtered, coef_filtered_only_RNA, coef_filtered_only_MET)



### RNA
data_PP_rna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "RNA" & !(is.na(PP_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_PP_rna_Estimate = data_PP_rna %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_PP_rna_pvalue = data_PP_rna %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_FS_rna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "RNA" & !(is.na(FS_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_FS_rna_Estimate = data_FS_rna %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_FS_rna_pvalue = data_FS_rna %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_deconv_rna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "RNA" & !(is.na(deconv_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, deconv_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_deconv_rna_Estimate = data_deconv_rna %>%
  select(late_int_method, deconv_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = deconv_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_deconv_rna_pvalue = data_deconv_rna %>%
  select(late_int_method, deconv_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = deconv_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()





### scRNA
data_PP_scrna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "scRNA" & !(is.na(PP_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_PP_scrna_Estimate = data_PP_scrna %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_PP_scrna_pvalue = data_PP_scrna %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_FS_scrna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "scRNA" & !(is.na(FS_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_FS_scrna_Estimate = data_FS_scrna %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_FS_scrna_pvalue = data_FS_scrna %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()





### MET
data_PP_met = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "MET" & !(is.na(PP_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_PP_met_Estimate = data_PP_met %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_PP_met_pvalue = data_PP_met %>%
  select(late_int_method, PP_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_FS_met = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "MET" & !(is.na(FS_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_FS_met_Estimate = data_FS_met %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_FS_met_pvalue = data_FS_met %>%
  select(late_int_method, FS_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_deconv_met = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "MET" & !(is.na(deconv_method))) %>%
  select(late_int_method, deconv_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_deconv_met_Estimate = data_deconv_met %>%
  select(late_int_method, deconv_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = deconv_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_deconv_met_pvalue = data_deconv_met %>%
  select(late_int_method, deconv_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = deconv_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("late_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()








col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(min(c(mat_PP_rna_Estimate, mat_PP_met_Estimate, mat_FS_rna_Estimate, mat_deconv_rna_Estimate, mat_deconv_met_Estimate), na.rm = TRUE), 
    0, 
    max(c(mat_PP_rna_Estimate, mat_PP_met_Estimate, mat_FS_rna_Estimate, mat_deconv_rna_Estimate, mat_deconv_met_Estimate), na.rm = TRUE)),
  c("#2166ac", "#f7f7f7", "#b2182b")
)

cell_fun_maker = function(pval_mat) {
  function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    if (!is.na(pval_mat[i, j])) {
      if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.001) {
        grid.text("***", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      } else if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.01) {
        grid.text("**", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      } else if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.05) {
        grid.text("*", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      } else if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.1) {
        grid.text(".", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      }
    }
  }
}






ht_PP_rna = Heatmap(
  mat_PP_rna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_met = Heatmap(
  mat_PP_met_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_scrna = Heatmap(
  mat_PP_scrna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_scrna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


ht_FS_rna = Heatmap(
  mat_FS_rna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selection RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_FS_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_met = Heatmap(
  mat_FS_met_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selection MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "",
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_FS_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_scrna = Heatmap(
  mat_FS_scrna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selection scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_FS_scrna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


ht_deconv_rna = Heatmap(
  mat_deconv_rna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Deconvolution RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_deconv_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_deconv_met = Heatmap(
  mat_deconv_met_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Deconvolution MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "",
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_deconv_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)


ht_list = ht_PP_rna + ht_PP_met + ht_FS_rna + ht_FS_met + ht_deconv_rna + ht_deconv_met #  + ht_PP_scrna  + ht_FS_scrna

draw(ht_list, 
     column_title = "Blocks interactions with late integration compare to baseline",
     column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 16, fontface = "bold"),
     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
     annotation_legend_side = "right")

# decorate_heatmap_body("Estimate", {
#   grid.text("* p<0.05  ** p<0.01  *** p<0.001", 
#             x = unit(0.5, "npc"), 
#             y = unit(-0.05, "npc"), 
#             just = "top",
#             gp = gpar(fontsize = 9, fontface = "italic"))
# })
```

#### Early_integration

```{r integration_interaction_plot}
library(tibble)

all_functions_ei_without_mix = all_functions_ei[c(3:6,9:12)] # to avoid repetition
mod = lm(score_aggreg ~ (preprocessing_RNA + feature_selection_RNA + preprocessing_scRNA + feature_selection_scRNA + preprocessing_MET + feature_selection_MET + early_integration + deconvolution)^2, data = results_ei[,c("score_aggreg", all_functions_ei_without_mix)])

mod$coefficients[!is.na(mod$coefficients)]



## Model

# First model for integration strategie
anova_results = stats::anova(mod) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("interaction")



## Heatmap

vars_x = c("deconvolution", "preprocessing_RNA", "feature_selection_RNA", "preprocessing_MET", "feature_selection_MET", "preprocessing_scRNA", "feature_selection_scRNA")
vars_y = "early_integration"


mod_summary = summary(mod)
coef_df = as.data.frame(mod_summary$coefficients) %>%
  rownames_to_column("term")

coef_filtered = coef_df %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, "early_integration") & str_detect(term, paste(vars_x, collapse = "|"))
  ) %>%
  rename(
    pvalue   = `Pr(>|t|)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    omic_type = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ "scRNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ "RNA",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ "MET",
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ "scRNA"
    ),
    PP_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_MET)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "preprocessing_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=preprocessing_scRNA)[^:]+")
    ),
    FS_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_RNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_RNA)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_MET") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_MET)[^:]+"),
      str_detect(term, "feature_selection_scRNA") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=feature_selection_scRNA)[^:]+"),
    ),
    # Extraire la modalité de deconvolution (après "deconvolution_rna" ou "deconvolution_met")
    deconv_method = case_when(
      str_detect(term, "deconvolution") ~ 
        str_extract(term, "(?<=deconvolution)[^:]+")
    ),
    # Extraire la modalité de early_integration (après "early_integration")
    early_int_method = str_extract(term, "(?<=early_integration).+$") %>%
      str_remove("^:") %>%  # enlever le ":" au début si présent
      str_remove(":deconvolution.*$")  # enlever la partie deconvolution à la fin
  )
  # mutate(
  #   deconv_label = paste0(deconv_method, "\n(", omic_type, ")"),
  #   pvalue_signif = pvalue < 0.05
  # )



library(ComplexHeatmap)

### RNA
data_PP_rna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "RNA" & !(is.na(PP_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_PP_rna_Estimate = data_PP_rna %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_PP_rna_pvalue = data_PP_rna %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_FS_rna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "RNA" & !(is.na(FS_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_FS_rna_Estimate = data_FS_rna %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_FS_rna_pvalue = data_FS_rna %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()






### scRNA
data_PP_scrna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "scRNA" & !(is.na(PP_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_PP_scrna_Estimate = data_PP_scrna %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_PP_scrna_pvalue = data_PP_scrna %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_FS_scrna = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "scRNA" & !(is.na(FS_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_FS_scrna_Estimate = data_FS_scrna %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_FS_scrna_pvalue = data_FS_scrna %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()







### MET
data_PP_met = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "MET" & !(is.na(PP_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_PP_met_Estimate = data_PP_met %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_PP_met_pvalue = data_PP_met %>%
  select(early_int_method, PP_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = PP_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()



data_FS_met = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(omic_type == "MET" & !(is.na(FS_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_FS_met_Estimate = data_FS_met %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_FS_met_pvalue = data_FS_met %>%
  select(early_int_method, FS_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = FS_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()






data_deconv = coef_filtered %>%
  filter(!(is.na(deconv_method))) %>%
  select(early_int_method, deconv_method, Estimate, pvalue)

mat_deconv_Estimate = data_deconv %>%
  select(early_int_method, deconv_method, Estimate) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = deconv_method, values_from = Estimate) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()

mat_deconv_pvalue = data_deconv %>%
  select(early_int_method, deconv_method, pvalue) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = deconv_method, values_from = pvalue) %>%
  tibble::column_to_rownames("early_int_method") %>%
  as.matrix()








col_fun = circlize::colorRamp2(
  c(min(c(mat_PP_rna_Estimate, mat_PP_met_Estimate, mat_FS_rna_Estimate, mat_FS_met_Estimate, mat_deconv_Estimate), na.rm = TRUE), 
    0, 
    max(c(mat_PP_rna_Estimate, mat_PP_met_Estimate, mat_FS_rna_Estimate, mat_FS_met_Estimate, mat_deconv_Estimate), na.rm = TRUE)),
  c("#2166ac", "#f7f7f7", "#b2182b")
)

cell_fun_maker = function(pval_mat) {
  function(j, i, x, y, width, height, fill) {
    if (!is.na(pval_mat[i, j])) {
      if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.001) {
        grid.text("***", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      } else if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.01) {
        grid.text("**", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      } else if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.05) {
        grid.text("*", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      } else if (pval_mat[i, j] < 0.1) {
        grid.text(".", x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10))
      }
    }
  }
}






ht_PP_rna = Heatmap(
  mat_PP_rna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Early Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_met = Heatmap(
  mat_PP_met_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = element_blank(),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_PP_scrna = Heatmap(
  mat_PP_scrna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Preprocessing scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_PP_scrna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = TRUE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)



ht_FS_rna = Heatmap(
  mat_FS_rna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selection RNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Early Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_FS_rna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_met = Heatmap(
  mat_FS_met_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selection MET",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "",
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_FS_met_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  # Pour éviter la duplication
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)

ht_FS_scrna = Heatmap(
  mat_FS_scrna_Estimate,
  name = "Estimate",
  col = col_fun,
  column_title = "Feature selection scRNA",
  column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  row_title = "Late Integration",
  row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold"),
  cell_fun = cell_fun_maker(mat_FS_scrna_pvalue),
  cluster_rows = FALSE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,
  na_col = "grey90",
  border = TRUE,
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 2)
)
```
